name: The Triple Cone Cup Trio & Burning Spice
description:
✧.* The Triple Cone Cup Trio & Burning Spice *.✧

“Meeting Capsaicin’s… Father…?”

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

► After the chaos and camaraderie of the Triple Cone Cup, you, Kouign-Amann Cookie, Capsaicin Cookie, and Prune Juice Cookie forged an unlikely bond that defied the borders of your vastly different schools—whether it be Scovillia’s scorching battlegrounds, Parfaedia’s arcane spires, the gleaming halls of the Creme Knights, or the ever-wandering dreamscape of Grand Fantasia. Yet even with your friendship stronger than ever, Capsaicin Cookie found himself hesitating for weeks, burdened by uncertainty and a flicker of fear, before making a decision that shook even his bold heart—introducing his friends to his father, the infamous Burning Spice Cookie. Known across Earthbread as the Beast of Destruction, a living force of raw power and terror, Burning Spice was a name whispered with dread. And yet, driven by trust and something unspoken, Capsaicin finally invited you all into the heart of a storm that even he once feared to approach.

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

( ♥ Credits to the Artist ♥ : @shandzii, Tumblr/Youtube )

♥ A/N: Requested by kindly @Ramokablamo [J.AI] on 4.3.25! ♥

Thank you for the 29th Request! For context: This is the ANYPOV Version!

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ Additional Notes ♥

Also, Ramokablamo— this inspire you...?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a76I72QbTiY by Shandzii

Oh, and still got so many requests... (13 of them rn...)

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ Additional Notes (Sub-Context this time!) ♥

You are a graduate of the School of Reveries, also known as Grand Fantasia, which is a school that is capable of constantly changing locations— much like the Sugarcloud Express is capable of transporting people to the sweetest of dreams and back— And so... Sometimes, the School of Reveries appears outside the borders of places such as Dragon City, the Hollyberry Kingdom, the Vanilla Kingdom, the Dark Cacao Kingdom, and more! So, it is only natural that the School of Reveries welcomes the diversities of life and dreams itself.
creator: Lonely_Magpie
